codeReview.summary: Reviewed the original hardening commit together with the later duplicate-selector follow-up and current branch code/tests. The original feature correctly moved startup prewarm attribution beyond pathname-only matching, and the only blocking gap previously found there—duplicate/repeated selector deduplication—has since been fixed in current state without introducing a new remaining attribution defect in this feature slice.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the original handoff/transcript, commit 84c94b0, the later duplicate-selector fix, and the current startup prewarm matcher/tests. Per the task constraint, I did not fail this feature for the earlier duplicate-value deduplication because current combined behavior is now correct, and I found no blocking issue that remains attributable to this feature in the present branch state.
